title: Global Perspectives on Advance Care Planning in long-term care: Insights into Providers, Practices, and Policies. A scoping review protocol
author: Johnson, Alisha
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The goal of this scoping review is to identify and describe how Advance Care Planning conversations are conducted in long-term care settings and to compare which healthcare provider roles, including nursing, are responsible for these activities. This review will provide an overview of which professionals are present in long-term care facilities across different countries as well as map the differences in roles and scopes of practice between countries for similar positions.
steps_raw: The goal of this scoping review is to identify and describe how Advance Care Planning conversations are conducted in long-term care settings and to compare which healthcare provider roles, including nursing, are responsible for these activities. This review will provide an overview of which professionals are present in long-term care facilities across different countries as well as map the differences in roles and scopes of practice between countries for similar positions.
